title: Select “Linked to” in mobile app
excerpt: In the iOS and iPad app, you cannot select an item in the “linked to” column. If this column has a linked item in it, created from the desktop version, you can click on the item and open the board. However, if blank, you…

posts.author: abiciea (Mike)
posts.cookedHtml: In the iOS and iPad app, you cannot select an item in the “linked to” column. If this column has a linked item in it, created from the desktop version, you can click on the item and open the board. However, if blank, you cannot add an item to this field. It’s very frustrating and greatly limits workflows in the app.

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
+1 on this… beside this… there are other things that needs to be considered on mobile apps.

  • improvements on search in board function.
  • there is no way to log manual hours on timetracking column
  • you cannot change a mirrored value from another board, you click a doesnt do nothing.
  • monday forms doesnt identify you when completing a form from android mobile browser, so when the form comes to a board it doesnt have his creator.
